basic_details.job_title: NEHU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow and Multi-Tasking Staff Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow and Multi-Tasking Staff
basic_details.short_information: North-Eastern Hill University (NEHU) Recruitment 2026: North-Eastern Hill University has released the official notification for 2 Junior Research Fellow and Multi-Tasking Staff posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./M.Tech. in BME/IT/CSE/ECE or MCA or M.Sc. in Computer Science/Electronics with CSIR-UGC NET/GATE or selected through National level examinations, OR Graduate/Diploma in any stream.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.E./M.Tech. in BME/IT/CSE/ECE or MCA or M.Sc. in Computer Science/Electronics Selected through National Eligibility Tests - CSIR-UGC NET and GATE Selected through National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies and Institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MoE, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER, NISER etc. Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS): Graduate/ Diploma in any stream.

salary_details.pay_scale: JRF: ₹37,000/- per month + HRA, MTS: ₹18,000/- per month
salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): ₹37,000/- per month + HRA (as per funding agency norms) Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS): ₹18,000/- per month

selection_process: Selection process through National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies and Institutions such as DST
NISER etc. (for JRF) Selection committee decision will be final.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NEHU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NEHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow and Multi-Tasking Staff positions at NEHU is 24th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NEHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Junior Research Fellow and Multi-Tasking Staff posts in the North-Eastern Hill University recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: For the Junior Research Fellow position, candidates need to have an M.E./M.Tech. in BME/IT/CSE/ECE or MCA or M.Sc. in Computer Science/Electronics, and be selected through CSIR-UGC NET/GATE or similar national-level examinations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS) position will receive a monthly salary of ₹18,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for NEHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications for NEHU Recruitment 2026 must be submitted via email to the designated address provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for NEHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for NEHU Recruitment 2026 does not mention any application fee for the candidates applying for these posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for the JRF and MTS posts?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow and Multi-Tasking Staff positions. Candidates are advised to check the detailed advertisement.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selection for the Junior Research Fellow post will be based on the candidate's performance in national-level examinations like CSIR-UGC NET and GATE, and other relevant selection processes conducted by central government agencies.

faq.question: Q9. Where is North-Eastern Hill University located?
faq.answer: North-Eastern Hill University (NEHU) is located in Shillong, Meghalaya, with the pincode 793022.

faq.question: Q10. What is the tentative date for the interview?
faq.answer: The tentative date for the interview for the NEHU Recruitment 2026 is 29th May 2026.
